content.cn_text: 导师:在我们开始之前，吉米和凯西，感谢你们今天来讨论你们目前的研究论文!我也会对你以后的演讲提出一些建议。
content.en_text: TUTOR: Before we start, Jimmy and Kathy, thanks for coming in today to talk about your current research paper! Well, I will also give you some suggestions for your future presentation later.

content.cn_text: 吉米:太好了!
content.en_text: JIMMY: That's great!

content.cn_text: 导师:好的，我已经读了导论一章，到目前为止，我喜欢你的观点
content.en_text: TUTOR: Okay, I have read the introductory chapter, and so far I like where you're

content.cn_text: 继续你们的研究吧，你们俩。
content.en_text: going with your research, you two.

content.cn_text: 凯西:谢谢!你觉得手术部分怎么样?
content.en_text: KATHY: Thanks! What did you think of the procedure section?

content.cn_text: 导师:我还没讲到呢。我稍后会讲到结果和讨论部分。
content.en_text: TUTOR: I haven't gotten there yet. I will get to that and the results and discussion section in a bit.

content.cn_text: 吉米:哦。如果你没有读过其余部分，你只是在说你喜欢前言吗?
content.en_text: JIMMY: Oh. If you haven't read the rest, are you just saying you like the introduction?

content.cn_text: 导师:不，布局做得很好。你的每一部分都有清晰的标记，页眉和页脚都有完美的格式，你的标题页是正确的。很多学生对此都有困难。
content.en_text: TUTOR: No - the layout is really well done. You have each section clearly marked and have the header and footer perfectly formatted, and your title page is right on the money. A lot of students have trouble with that one.

content.cn_text: 吉米:说实话，我们确实参考了很多课堂上的例子。
content.en_text: JIMMY: To be honest, we did refer a lot to the example we received in class.

content.cn_text: 导师:只要你不复制信息，这样做对间距和布局很有好处。不过，背景信息有点稀疏。你可能想要添加一些。
content.en_text: TUTOR: That's good to do for spacing and layout, as long as you're not also copying the information. The background information is a little sparse, though. You may want to add to it.

content.cn_text: 凯西:你这么认为?我更担心我是否有足够的数据。
content.en_text: KATHY: You think so? I was more worried about whether I had enough data.

content.cn_text: 导师:你确实需要更多的背景知识。我会考虑在网上找更多的文章，或者在校园图书馆做更多的研究。
content.en_text: TUTOR: You definitely need more background information. I would think about finding some more online articles or doing more research in the campus library.

content.cn_text: 吉米:好主意，我们可以明天去。我发现在在线期刊数据库中查找主题太难了。
content.en_text: JIMMY: That's a good idea - we can go tomorrow. I find it too tough finding the subject matter in the online journal database.

content.cn_text: 导师:我也喜欢翻阅纸质杂志，而不是在电脑上往下翻阅。
content.en_text: TUTOR: I also like being able to flip through the physical journal as opposed to trying to scroll down on a computer.

content.cn_text: 凯西:我也是。哦，我差点忘了。我已经在摘要中包含了我所有的引用，但是你能帮我做一下参考书目吗?我应该用参考书目，对吧?不是阑尾?
content.en_text: KATHY: Me too. Oh, I almost forgot. I've included all of my citations in the abstract, but could you help me with the bibliography? I should be using a bibliography, right?Not an appendix?

content.cn_text: 导师:当然，我可以帮忙。是的——对于这种类型的科学研究论文，在参考书目中列出你在论文正文中引用的所有来源。去我上次给你的网站看看列出每个来源的确切方法。
content.en_text: TUTOR: Sure, I can help with that. Yes - for this type of scientific research paper, list all sources that you cite in the body of your paper in a bibliography. Go to the website I gave you last time to see the exact way to list each source.

content.cn_text: 凯西:好的，谢谢。我会的。我们还有很多事情要解决。
content.en_text: KATHY: Okay, thanks. I'll do that. We still have a lot of things to fix up.

content.cn_text: 导师:是的，但是这里有很多好东西可以用。论文说得够多了，演讲进行得怎么样了?
content.en_text: TUTOR: Yeah, but there's a lot of good stuff here to work with. So enough about the paper, how is the presentation going?

content.cn_text: 凯西:嗯，没关系。吉米在整理参考书目的时候，我要去试用一下新的演示软件。
content.en_text: KATHY: Well, it's alright. I am going to go try out the new presentation software while Jimmy's working on the bibliography.

content.cn_text: 吉米:是的，我们希望制作一个真正的泵的动画，但是还有很多要学的。
content.en_text: JIMMY: Yeah, we are hoping to make an animation of an actual pump but still have a lot to learn about how to do that.

content.cn_text: 凯西:在我们开始这个计划之前，谁会想到我们可以
content.en_text: KATHY: Who would have thought before we started this project that we would be able

content.cn_text: 为了重现泵的运动?这东西太有趣了。
content.en_text: to recreate the motion of a pump? This stuff is just so interesting.

content.cn_text: 导师:听你这么说真高兴!
content.en_text: TUTOR: So glad to hear it!

content.cn_text: 吉米:是啊，我很高兴我这学期选修了工程学。我当然想跟上它。
content.en_text: JIMMY: Yeah, I am glad I took engineering this semester. I would definitely like to keep up with it.

content.cn_text: 导师:你知道，有一个组织叫机械工程师协会。你应该考虑加入它。你需要在工程课上取得好成绩才能获得资格，但我认为你能做到。
content.en_text: TUTOR: You know, there's an organisation called the Machine Engineer Society.You should look into joining it. You would need to score well in your engineering class to qualify, but I think you can do it.

content.cn_text: 凯西:嗯，有意思。我一定会去看看的。我真的很想接触一些工程领域的专业人士，以了解更多。不过我现在在这一行谁也不认识。
content.en_text: KATHY: Hm, interesting. I will definitely check it out. I would really like to get in contact with some professionals in the engineering field to find out more. I don't really know anyone in the field now, though.

content.cn_text: 吉米:我想，如果你经常在课堂上结识同学和教授，你就能接触到一些真正有帮助的人。
content.en_text: JIMMY: I think if you keep meeting people in your classes and professors you'll be able to get in contact with some really helpful people.

content.cn_text: 导师:说得好，吉米。如果工程泵是你们都特别感兴趣的东西，确保你们保持最新的发展。事实上，你可以定期参观当地的水处理设施，看看有什么新的发展。
content.en_text: TUTOR: Well said, Jimmy. If engineering pumps is something you both are specifically interested in, make sure you stay up to date on new developments. In fact, you could visit the local water treatment facility periodically to see what new developments are going on.

content.cn_text: 凯西:嗯，那可能是获得实际经验的好方法。
content.en_text: KATHY: Hm, that may be a good way to get some practical experience.

content.cn_text: 导师:嗯，我想他们不会让你只参观设施就能操作任何设备。可以说，如果你真的想亲自动手，我建议你去找一份暑期实习。
content.en_text: TUTOR: Well, I don't think they would let you handle any equipment by just visiting the facility. If you really want to get your hands dirty, so to speak, I would recommend instead seeking a summer internship.

content.cn_text: 卡西:哇，你有这么多有用的建议让你出人头地。现在，如果你能告诉我如何出版我的作品就好了!
content.en_text: KATHY: Wow, you have so many helpful suggestions for getting a leg up. Now if only you could tell me how to get my work published!

content.cn_text: 吉米:哈哈，那不是很好吗?
content.en_text: JIMMY: Haha, wouldn't that be nice.

content.cn_text: 导师:嗯，老实说，你真正需要做的就是一旦你有了论文，就把它展示出来。经常把它呈现给许多观众，一旦你得到反馈，就进行调整。总有一天你会出版的。
content.en_text: TUTOR: Well, honestly, all you really need to do is once you have a dissertation,present it. Present it often and to many audiences, and once you get feedback, adjust it.You'll get published one day.

content.cn_text: 卡西:哇，这次会议真的很鼓舞人心。谢谢你的帮助!
content.en_text: KATHY': Wow, this meeting has been truly inspiring. Thanks for your help!

groups.desc:
Questions 21-25
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: Which part has the tutor already read?
items.analysis: 导师明确表示他已经读过了引言章节（introductory chapter），这直接对应了选项A。而对于其他章节，如程序部分（procedure section）和结果讨论部分（results and discussion section），导师明确表示还没有读到那里。因此，A选项是唯一符合原文内容的答案。

items.title: Which part of the paper did the tutor like?
items.analysis: 导师明确表示喜欢论文的布局（layout）。他赞扬了各个部分的标记、页眉页脚的格式以及标题页，这些都是论文布局的组成部分。导师还特别指出许多学生在这方面都有困难，进一步强调了他对学生在布局方面工作的赞赏。因此，正确答案是B选项（layout）。

items.title: Kathy and the tutor both agree to continue to

options.title: A
options.content: refer a lot to the example received in class.

options.title: C
options.content: conduct further research in the library.

items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是C，因为在对话中，导师明确建议Kathy和Jimmy需要更多的背景信息，并提出在校图书馆做更多研究。Jimmy随后表示同意，说"那是个好主意"。虽然Kathy没有直接表示同意，但她之前表达了对资料不足的担忧，并且在整个对话中一直积极接受导师的建议。因此，我们可以推断Kathy和导师都同意在图书馆进行更多研究。

items.title: Kathy asks the tutor for help with the______section.
items.analysis: Kathy明确向导师询问了关于参考文献（bibliography）的帮助，而不是摘要（abstract）或附录（appendix）。导师直接回应说可以帮助她，并确认她应该使用参考文献（bibliography）来列出所有引用的资料来源。这明确指出Kathy需要帮助的是参考文献部分，因此正确答案是B（bibliography）。

items.title: What will Kathy do next?
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是A，因为Kathy明确表示她接下来要去试用新的演示软件。在对话中，Kathy说"I am going to go try out the new presentation software"，这直接对应了选项A "try out software"。这个陈述清楚地表明了Kathy的下一步计划，与题目询问的"What will Kathy do next?"完全吻合。

groups.desc:
Questions 26-30
What is the desired outcome to each of the following course of action?
Choose FIVE answers from the box and write the correct letter, A-F, next to questions 26-30.
Desired outcomes

items.title: Make a good grade
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是C（join Machine Engineer Society），因为听力材料中明确提到需要在工程课程中取得好成绩才能有资格加入Machine Engineer Society。题干中的"Make a good grade"与听力中的"score well in your engineering class"是同义表达，都指取得好成绩。而这个好成绩是为了达到加入Machine Engineer Society的目的，因此C是最符合题意的选项。

items.title: Meet engineering professionals
items.analysis: 正确答案是F (make important contacts)，因为原文中Kathy表示她想要认识工程领域的专业人士，这实际上就是在建立重要的联系。"get in contact with some professionals"与"meet engineering professionals"是同义表达，而建立这些联系的目的显然是为了在工程领域建立重要的人脉关系。

items.title: Visit the factory
items.analysis: 正确答案是E（stay up to date），因为在原文中，导师建议学生访问当地的水处理设施是为了了解新的发展："In fact, you could visit the local water treatment facility periodically to see what new developments are going on"。这表明访问设施的目的是为了了解行业的最新发展，而不是获得实践经验或其他选项中提到的目的。

items.title: Seek summer internships
items.analysis: 文中明确指出，如果想要"get your hands dirty"（亲身体验），应该寻找暑期实习。这表明暑期实习的主要目的是获得实际经验。选项A "practical experience"（实际经验）与这一目的直接对应，因此是正确答案。

items.title: Present dissertation
items.analysis: 文中明确指出，通过多次展示论文并根据反馈进行调整，最终目标是发表论文。这直接回答了题干中"Present dissertation"（展示论文）的预期结果。讲话者强调了展示论文的过程（多次展示，获取反馈，进行调整），并最后得出结论"You'll get published one day"（有一天你会发表成功），清楚地表明展示论文的最终目标是发表作品。因此，B选项（publish the work）是最符合题意的答案。
